nextSafeAction: Reviewer inspects inert demo work-package evidence and records an explicit decision before any trusted promotion is considered.

requiredDecisions.description: independent reviewer decision required for the demo work package

allowedCommands.boundary: inert display text only; handoff does not execute commands

driftGuardrails: demo is evidence-gated local collaboration, not autonomous project mutation
generated task boards and runs stay ignored unless fixture-scoped
boundary: advisory fixture evidence only; it does not execute commands, write files, apply mutations, merge branches, or grant production authority
